name: Shine Greymon
description: A Light Dragon Digimon which fights with the red-hot solar energy it accumulates. Its Special Moves are spreading its gigantic wings, concentrating that light energy to its utmost limit, then firing it ( Glorious Burst ), and mowing down the opponent with wings of glimmering light ( Shining Blast ). Also, it can summon the GeoGrey Sword , in which the power of Gaia is condensed, from the solid earth.
